title: licania ovalifolia
intro: Licania ovalifolia, also known as the oval-leaf licania, is a plant species in the family Chrysobalanaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Licania ovalifolia include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Licania ovalifolia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used to make a topical cream or ointment for skin conditions.
